_comment: PLACEHOLDER — replace with real output from survey/ (detect.py + gsd.py + reason.py + score.py + report.py). Every number here drives the HUD.

hero.cause: Chloride-induced reinforcement corrosion under coastal exposure — expansive rust at the rebar opens the surface crack.
hero.action: Repair within cycle · assess structural impact (RI)

report.title: MBIS — External Wall Inspection
lines: Surface width 1.8 mm — exceeds 0.3 mm durability limit (CoP Structural Use of Concrete 2013).
Probable cause: chloride-induced rebar corrosion, coastal exposure.
Recommendation: repair within inspection cycle; assess structural impact.
Subject to verification & sign-off by Registered Inspector.
